commit.message:
Implement notification system with server cluster, workers, emulators, and load testing

- Notification server: REST API, input validation, template rendering, Redis caching, RabbitMQ routing
- Notification worker: 4 dedicated queue consumers (APNS/FCM/SMS/EMAIL) with retry logic
- Third-party emulator: simulates delivery services with 95% success rate
- Device emulator: receives notifications, WebSocket broadcast, REST stats
- Load client: seeds test data, multi-threaded load test with p95/p99 reporting
- Infrastructure: PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ, Prometheus, Grafana with pre-provisioned dashboard
- Docker Compose with service health checks and replicas
- 27 unit tests covering validation, services, controllers, consumers
- Component diagram in drawio format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: 馬場・距離・天候・締め切り時刻が通知に表示されない問題を修正

【原因】
1. course_type / distance
   _result_to_race_data() が getattr(result, "course_type") を試みていたが
   PredictionResult にそのフィールドが存在しない → 常に空文字
   → ヘッダーの距離・コース種別が "---" になっていた

2. weather / ground_condition
   WeatherFetcher (requests) が JS レンダリング必須の shutuba.html を
   静的取得するため失敗し "不明" を返す
   → fetch_today_entries() (Selenium) が正確に取得した race_info を使わず
     失敗した WeatherFetcher 結果を display に使っていた

3. 締め切り時刻
   getattr(result, "start_time") → PredictionResult にない → 常に空

【修正】
- _result_to_race_data() / send_prediction() に
  course_type / distance / deadline 引数を追加
- runner.py: WeatherFetcher を廃止し race_info から直接 weather /
  ground_condition / course_type / distance を取得して渡す
  特徴量コード変換は WEATHER_MAP / GROUND_CONDITION_MAP を直接使用
- deadline = race["start_time"] - 2分 で算出して渡す
- webhook.py: 同様に race_info から直接取得、馬の mark (◎○▲) も設定

style(dark-mode): enhance dark mode visual consistency (#214)

* style: 图标统一优化 - 内联 SVG 替换为 lucide-react (Cycle #114)

## 优化内容
- SessionItem: 替换所有内联 SVG 为 lucide-react 图标 (Download, FileText, FolderOpen, ChevronLeft, Check, Trash2)
- SessionList: 替换所有内联 SVG 为 lucide-react 图标 (PanelLeft, PanelLeftClose, Plus, Search, X, ChevronRight, FolderOpen, MoreVertical, ArrowLeft, Pencil, Trash2)

## 测试更新
- 更新测试选择器以匹配新的 lucide-react 图标结构
- 使用类名选择器 `svg[class*='lucide-xxx']` 替代 SVG 路径选择器
- 更新加载状态测试使用 `animate-shimmer` 类

## 效果
- 代码更简洁，减少约 200 行代码
- 图标风格统一，与 shadcn/ui 设计系统一致
- 更易维护，图标来自统一的 lucide-react 库

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix baselining to check DDL presence before marking migrations as applied

Previously, baselineIfNeeded() blindly marked all journal entries as
baselined whenever the Ingredient table existed, causing new migrations
(e.g. 0002 adding description column) to be skipped. Now each migration
is only baselined if its DDL (CREATE TABLE, ADD COLUMN, CREATE TYPE) is
already present in the database — unrecognised or not-yet-applied
migrations are left for migrate() to run normally.
